scripts.generate-certs: mkdir -p certs && LAN_IP=$(ipconfig getifaddr en0 || ipconfig getifaddr en1 || echo 127.0.0.1) && openssl req -x509 -newkey rsa:2048 -nodes -keyout certs/localhost.key -out certs/localhost.crt -days 365 -subj '/CN=localhost' -addext "subjectAltName=DNS:localhost,IP:127.0.0.1,IP:$LAN_IP"
